object_a.label: ceiling light
object_a.description: flush-mounted round ceiling light in hallway
object_a.long_form_open_description: Circular flush ceiling fixture with a diffuser, centered in the hallway ceiling roughly midway down the corridor; provides warm white illumination and is mounted to the textured ceiling.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: centered above the hallway, roughly between the camera and the dining room opening

object_b.label: ceiling light
object_b.long_form_open_description: Circular flush-mount ceiling fixture with a metal ring and frosted diffuser providing warm ambient light. Centered in the hallway ceiling near the foreground-to-middle region; casts even illumination.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: mounted on the ceiling above and slightly ahead of the American flag and the hallway floor
